prompt:
Assign GRADE certainty ratings to each evidence item below.
Ratings: HIGH (systematic review of RCTs, low heterogeneity), MODERATE (RCT with some concerns, or consistent observational), LOW (observational studies, high heterogeneity, indirect evidence), VERY_LOW (case reports, expert opinion, serious limitations).

For each item, output ONLY the number and rating, one per line:
1. HIGH
2. MODERATE
...

EVIDENCE:
1. [GOLD] Source: Influence of Lamination Conditions of EVA Encapsulation on P | Statement: STR (EVA manufacturer) suggests minimum 53 N/cm peel strength after lamination by 180-degree peel to ensure 20-year lifetime.
2. [SILVER] Source: Influence of Lamination Conditions of EVA Encapsulation on P | Statement: Tracy et al. proposed threshold debonding energy of 160 J/m2 for encapsulant interfaces and 10 J/m2 for backsheet interfaces to avoid delamination.
3. [SILVER] Source: Damp Heat Test | Kiwa PVEL PV Module Reliability Scorecard 2 | Statement: Only 69% of BOMs tested degraded by less than 6% power after damp heat testing in the 2024 PVEL Scorecard.
4. [GOLD] Source: Effect of Thermal Aging on Mechanical Properties and Color D | Statement: SEM observation showed smooth glass fiber surfaces in GF/PEI-145 specimens, indicating obvious separation between glass fiber and PEI matrix at high a
